data.title: Home hydroponics market to reach $3.77 billion by 2030, growing at a 16.0% CAGR from 2025, per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on July 4, 2025, the market for home hydroponics is valued at approximately $1.80 billion this year and is forecasted to grow to around $3.77 billion by 2030, displaying a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 16.0% during the period from 2025 to 2030. These figures come from a report released by MarketsandMarkets™. The popularity and adoption of home hydroponics systems are on the rise, indicating a significant market expansion in the coming years.

data.title: North America sees uptrend in electronic tools for CVs, expect cloud-based systems, automation and customization by 2030.
data.description: A report titled "Medium and Heavy-duty Commercial Vehicle (CV) Electronic Service Tools (EST) Market, North America, 2025-2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The North American market for medium and heavy-duty commercial vehicle electronic service tools is on a steady growth trajectory. This growth is fueled by various industry factors including advancements in vehicle complexity, an increasing emphasis on vehicle efficiency and fuel economy. The market is projected to experience gradual and sustained growth from 2025 to 2030.

data.title: Immuthera's Scientific Advisory Board brings world-leading expertise in diabetes and immunotherapy solutions.
data.description: The Scientific Advisory Board of Immuthera boasts top-tier expertise in the fields of diabetes and immunotherapy. These renowned experts are spearheading the development of cutting-edge solutions in these areas. With a diverse range of knowledge and experience, the board members are guiding Immuthera towards the next generation of treatments. Their collective insight and proficiency ensure that Immuthera remains at the forefront of innovation in diabetes and immunotherapy.
